---
title: "LangSmith"
format: html
---

- [What Is **LangSmith**? Explained in 5 Minutes](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kYtnLaJeia8&list=PLfaIDFEXuae2CjNiTeqXG5r8n9rld9qQu&index=9)
  - [Observability Concepts](https://docs.langchain.com/langsmith/observability-concepts)
  - [Evaluation Concepts](https://docs.langchain.com/langsmith/evaluation-concepts)
  - [Prompt Engineering Concepts](https://docs.langchain.com/langsmith/prompt-engineering-concepts)
- Run a local agent server for: [LangSmith Studio](https://docs.langchain.com/langsmith/studio)
